applicability_notes: Composite unary op: softsign(x) = x / (1 + |x|). Golden registered via TTNN eltwise unary golden map ('softsign': torch.nn.functional.softsign). Supports bfloat16 and bfloat8_b per unit tests; validated at pcc=0.9999. Can also fuse the manual decomposition chain x / (1 + torch.abs(x)) into a single ttnn.softsign call.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.softsign(input_tensor)

placement_observations.source: unit_test: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default (DRAM interleaved) memory config
